20: Iron Oxide ratio

29: Modified Normalized Difference Water Index

25: Normalized Burn Ratio

26: Normalize Difference Build-up Index

27: Normalized Difference Moisture Index

esriBandArithmeticNDSI = 28

28: Normalized Difference Snow Index

1: NDVI: Normalized Differential Vegetation Index

esriBandArithmeticNDVIre = 12

12: NDVIre: Red Edge NDVI

18: NDWI: Normalized difference water index, proposed in 1996

6: PVI: Perpendicular Vegetation Index

esriBandArithmeticRTVICore = 15

15: RTVICore: Red Edge Traingular Vegetataion Index (Core Only)

2: SAVI: Soil Adjusted Vegetation Index

11: SR: Simple Ratio

13: SRre: Red Edge Simple Ratio

8: Sultans Process

0: User Defined

esriBandArithmeticVARI = 9

9: VARI: Visible Atmospherically Resistant Index
